rationale: The desired report is likely not in "My reports"; switching to the Global catalog will show all available reports to search within.
If the report is owned by a group, switching to the Group tab can surface it for selection.
Using the on-page list search is the most direct way to find a report by its title.

action_text: Toggle the Show/Hide filter for the reports list
rationale: Filtering the list enables entering a condition like Title contains "Incidents by agent" to quickly locate the report.

action_text: Sort the reports list by the Title column
rationale: Sorting by Title can make it easier to scan for “Incidents by agent” alphabetically if search/filter isn’t available.
